original_image_tags: A single sheet of yellowed, aged paper with three hole-punches at the top. The paper appears to be the reverse side of a typed document, as faint, reversed text from the front is visible through the page. Several stamps and handwritten annotations are present.

elements.description: Back side of a typed document with visible paper texture and bleed-through text. Several stamps are present: a red handwritten 'file' at the top, a 'RELEASED BY NATIONAL ARCHIVES' stamp in the middle, a date stamp 'APR 20 3 57 PM '60' next to 'FBI - JUSTICE', a date stamp 'APR 21 12 28 PM '60', a 'RECEIVED MAIL' stamp, a 'US GOVERNMENT' stamp, and a small 'COPY 2' stamp at the bottom right.

judge.reason: Both agree on the main visual content: aged paper with bleed-through text and several stamps, but Description B adds specific stamp text details that Description A omits without contradiction.
